g.text: Timeline: Cache Line Arrives During Probe
Memory fetch | ~200 cycles| DRAM to L1
Probe slots i..i+7| ~40 cycles | 8 key compares
Slot i+8 access | ~4 cycles | L1 HIT (prefetched!)
Key Insight: Memory fetch happens in parallel with useful work

// Compare keys at slots i through i+7
// Cache line for slot i+8 now in L1!
// No stall - data ready when we arrive
